description: An all-time favourite accessory, belts are an integral part of creating the well groomed look. This brown leather belt from turtle is set to add an sophisticated edge to your style. Also, every time you purchase a Turtle product, part of the proceeds go towards protecting and conserving turtles. This is part of the Save Turtle project created in collaboration with WWF and Wildlife Society of Orissa.Length117 cmMade of leather with a textured finish for absolute durability, comfort and styleStylish buckle clasp and holes to customise FitMetal brand tab embossed on the side of the buckleCareWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustUse a leather conditioner to maintain belt quality if necessary
